projects.title: Kitchen Chaos
projects.description: A fast-paced, Unity-based cooking simulation game featuring sprite, animation, and sound asset integration.

projects.title: Dodge the Ball
projects.description: Survive waves of enemy balls chasing you on a platform. Features AI behavior and physics-based interactions.

projects.title: Lunar Lander
projects.description: 2D space game where players control a lander navigating multiple levels while managing fuel.

projects.title: Spotify-Clone
projects.description: Responsive music player built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Features playlists and audio controls.

projects.title: Password-Manager
projects.description: Secure and responsive password manager application built with React and Vite.

projects.title: TodoList
projects.description: Minimal React/Vite/TypeScript task manager with Hot Module Replacement and ESLint integration.
